message:
Migrate StringHashMap to ArrayHashMap for better performance

- ArrayHashMap: O(n) iteration, better cache locality
- wyhash: faster than default hash
- Updated all call sites: .keyIterator() → .keys()
- Updated: .valueIterator() → .values()
- Updated: .remove() → .swapRemove()
- Updated: .fetchRemove() → .fetchSwapRemove()
